SELECT CAST(value AS Int8) AS cast_string_to_int8 FROM test_cast;
SELECT CAST(value AS UInt8) AS cast_string_to_uint8 FROM test_cast;
SELECT CAST(value AS Decimal(3, 2)) AS cast_string_to_decimal FROM test_cast;
SELECT CAST(CAST(value AS Decimal(3, 2)) AS String) AS cast_decimal_to_string FROM test_cast;
SELECT CAST('2000-01-01' AS Date) AS cast_string_to_date FROM (SELECT value FROM test_cast) AS subquery;
SELECT CAST(value AS DateTime) AS cast_string_to_datetime FROM (SELECT value FROM test_cast WHERE value LIKE '%-%-%') AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE t1 (id UInt32, amount Float64);
SELECT id, CAST(amount AS Int32) AS cast_float_to_int32 FROM t1;
SELECT id, CAST(CAST(amount AS Int32) AS Float64) AS cast_int_to_float64 FROM t1;
SELECT CAST(CAST(NULL AS UInt16) AS Nullable(UInt16)) AS nullable_conversion;
SELECT CAST(CAST(value AS Int32) AS Nullable(Int32)) AS cast_string_to_nullable_int32 FROM test_cast WHERE value IN ('-1', '100');
SELECT CAST(toInt8(-1) AS UInt8) AS overflow_test;
SELECT CAST(CAST(value AS FixedString(22)) AS String) AS cast_fixed_string_to_string FROM (SELECT value FROM test_cast WHERE value != 'not_a_number') AS nested_subquery;
SELECT id, amount, CAST(CAST(amount AS Nullable(Int32)) AS UInt32) AS nested_cast FROM t1 WHERE amount < 1000;
